## Summary

Describe the documentation or public-beta resource change.

## Problem addressed

What confusion, defect, or testing limitation does this change solve?

## Scope

List the files and sections changed.

## Validation

Explain how you checked:

- Markdown rendering;
- internal links;
- terminology;
- safety and redaction;
- consistency with current beta behavior.

## Public safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, cookies, or private keys are included.
- [ ] No customer data or confidential repository content is included.
- [ ] No unpatched vulnerability details are included.
- [ ] No unsupported product claims are introduced.
- [ ] The change is limited to public documentation or beta resources.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] I accept the contribution terms in `LICENSE`.

## Screenshots

Add only sanitized screenshots when they materially improve review.
